notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: 国新办记者见面会上的“基层声音”：工作很繁杂但也最有温度
articles.highlight: 在国新办举行的“新征程上的奋斗者”中外记者见面会上，四位全国“两优一先”代表分享了他们在基层工作的感受。
articles.summary: 文章报道了四位全国优秀共产党员、优秀党务工作者和先进基层党组织代表在国新办记者见面会上分享基层工作经历。他们讲述了工作中的繁琐与温暖，展现了基层党员的坚守与奉献，值得关注以了解中国基层治理的真实面貌。
articles.failureAnalysis: 基层工作虽繁杂，但代表们强调其温度和意义，启示我们应更多关注基层实践与群众需求。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新网北京7月22日电(记者 袁秀月)前不久，在中国共产党成立105周年之际，党中央表彰了一批全国优秀共产党员、全国优秀党务工作者和全国先进基层党组织。7月22日，在国新办举行的“新征程上的奋斗者”中外记者见面会上，四位全国“两优一先”代表分享了他们在基层工作的感受。

They described the complexity and warmth of their work, showcasing the dedication of grassroots Party members, offering insights into China's grassroots governance.
en.failureAnalysis: Grassroots work is complex yet meaningful, highlighting the need for greater attention to frontline practices and people's needs.

articles.title: “创客广东”创新创业大赛助推中小企业成长 赋能智能装备与家居行业发展
articles.highlight: 大赛以奖金激励、全链条资源对接，助力科创项目落地生根，助推实体经济与制造业转型升级。
articles.summary: 文章报道了第十届“创客广东”智能装备与智能家居中小企业创新创业大赛决赛在广州黄埔举行，吸引近200支队伍参赛。大赛通过奖金和全链条资源对接，助力科创项目落地，推动实体经济与制造业转型升级，展示了赛事如何有效支持中小企业创新。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：大赛连接了创新项目与产业资源，但后续转化效果仍需持续跟踪。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新网广州7月22日电 (记者 王坚)第十届“创客广东”智能装备与智能家居中小企业创新创业大赛22日在广州黄埔纳金科技产业园举行决赛。该赛事吸引来自中小企业、创业团队的近200家队伍报名参加。大赛以奖金激励、全链条资源对接，助力科创项目落地生根，助推实体经济与制造业转型升级。

en.highlight: The competition uses prize incentives and full-chain resource matching to help sci-tech innovation projects take root and promote real economy and manufacturing transformation and upgrading.
en.summary: The article reports on the final of the 10th ‘Maker Guangdong’ Smart Equipment and Smart Home SME Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition held in Guangzhou Huangpu, attracting nearly 200 teams. Through prizes and full-chain resource connections, the competition facilitates the landing of sci-tech projects and drives transformation and upgrading of the real economy and manufacturing, demonstrating how the event effectively supports SME innovation.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: The competition effectively links innovation projects with industrial resources, but the subsequent transformation results require continuous tracking.
en.title: ‘Maker Guangdong’ Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition Boosts SME Growth, Empowers Smart Equipment and Home Furnishing Industries

articles.title: Nicaragua’s congress announces ‘work plan’ to suspend elections
articles.highlight: 美国国务卿表示国际社会应‘团结起来’反对奥尔特加独裁政权
articles.summary: 尼加拉瓜国会宣布实施总统奥尔特加的命令，不再举行选举。联合国和美国强烈谴责这一举动。了解这一事件有助于理解国际社会对独裁政权的态度。
articles.failureAnalysis: 本文是国际新闻报道。关键点在于国际社会对尼加拉瓜民主倒退的回应。
articles.sourceExcerpt: US secretary of state says international community should ‘join forces’ against authoritarian Ortega regime Nicaragua’s congress, controlled by the country’s long-serving president, Daniel Ortega, has announced a “work plan” to implement the authoritarian leader’s order that the country should no longer hold elections. The UN and the US strongly condemned Sunday’s announcement by Ortega, who has been in power since 2007 and, after a controversial constitutional change last year, now governs alongside his wife , Rosario Murillo, as “co-president”.

zh.title: 尼加拉瓜国会宣布‘工作计划’暂停选举
zh.highlight: 美国国务卿表示国际社会应‘团结起来’反对奥尔特加独裁政权
zh.summary: 尼加拉瓜国会宣布实施总统奥尔特加的命令，不再举行选举。联合国和美国强烈谴责这一举动。了解这一事件有助于理解国际社会对独裁政权的态度。
zh.failureAnalysis: 本文是国际新闻报道。关键点在于国际社会对尼加拉瓜民主倒退的回应。

en.highlight: US secretary of state says international community should 'join forces' against authoritarian Ortega regime
en.summary: Nicaragua's congress, controlled by President Daniel Ortega, has announced a plan to implement his order to suspend elections. The UN and US strongly condemned the move, highlighting international concern over democratic backsliding.
en.failureAnalysis: This is international news. The key takeaway is the international community's response to democratic deterioration in Nicaragua.
en.title: Nicaragua's congress announces 'work plan' to suspend elections

articles.title: Former Lloyd's of London boss's relationship breached rules, firm says
articles.highlight: 保险市场主席称CEO的行为“远低于对他的期望”。
articles.summary: 文章报道伦敦劳合社前首席执行官因未披露与某公司的关系而违反规定，保险公司主席表示其行为远低于预期标准。值得关注的是这凸显了金融行业高管合规的重要性。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：即使高层领导也必须严格遵守行业规则和披露要求。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The insurance market's chairman said the CEO's conduct "fell significantly below the standards expected of him".

en.title: Former Lloyd's of London boss's relationship breached rules, firm says

articles.title: t8y2/dbx
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目是一个极轻量级的数据库管理工具，仅20MB却支持超过70种数据库，包括主流和国产数据库。内置AI助手和多种部署方式（桌面、Docker、CLI），降低了数据库操作的复杂度。对于非技术用户和开发团队，这是一个降低数据库管理门槛、提高效率的有趣尝试。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能面临挑战：首先，支持70+数据库意味着维护成本极高，每个数据库的兼容性和特性差异可能导致bug频出；其次，内置AI助手在数据库场景下的准确性和实用性存疑，用户可能更信任成熟的数据库客户端；最后，跨平台和多种部署方式增加了测试和分发复杂度，小型团队难以持续投入。
articles.highlight: 20 MB轻量级跨平台数据库客户端，支持70+数据库，内置AI助手、MCP Server、CLI、桌面端和Docker。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 11196 stars and recent public activity. Description: 20 MB lightweight cross-platform database client for 70+ databases, including MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, SQL Server, and Dameng. Built-in AI, MCP Server, CLI, desktop and Docker.

zh.title: t8y2/dbx：20MB跨平台数据库客户端，内置AI助手，支持70+数据库
zh.highlight: 20 MB轻量级跨平台数据库客户端，支持70+数据库，内置AI助手、MCP Server、CLI、桌面端和Docker。
zh.summary: 该项目是一个极轻量级的数据库管理工具，仅20MB却支持超过70种数据库，包括主流和国产数据库。内置AI助手和多种部署方式（桌面、Docker、CLI），降低了数据库操作的复杂度。对于非技术用户和开发团队，这是一个降低数据库管理门槛、提高效率的有趣尝试。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能面临挑战：首先，支持70+数据库意味着维护成本极高，每个数据库的兼容性和特性差异可能导致bug频出；其次，内置AI助手在数据库场景下的准确性和实用性存疑，用户可能更信任成熟的数据库客户端；最后，跨平台和多种部署方式增加了测试和分发复杂度，小型团队难以持续投入。

en.highlight: 20 MB lightweight cross-platform database client supporting 70+ databases, with built-in AI assistant, MCP Server, CLI, desktop, and Docker deployment.
en.summary: This project is an ultra-lightweight database management tool supporting over 70 databases including mainstream and domestic ones, with a built-in AI assistant and multiple deployment options. It aims to lower the barrier for database operations, especially for non-technical users and development teams.
en.failureAnalysis: The main risks include high maintenance costs due to supporting 70+ databases, questionable accuracy and usefulness of the built-in AI, and the complexity of cross-platform testing and distribution.
en.title: t8y2/dbx: 20MB Cross-Platform Database Client with Built-in AI, Supporting 70+ Databases

articles.title: oomol-lab/open-connector
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 这是一个开源项目，旨在通过统一的认证网关，让AI代理能够安全访问超过1000个SaaS服务。它提供了多种接入方式（SDK、CLI、MCP等），降低了AI应用与外部服务集成的门槛。该项目在GitHub上已有3096颗星，显示出社区对其价值的认可。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目需要维护与大量SaaS提供商的兼容性，面临持续更新和适配的成本挑战。认证网关市场已有成熟竞争者，新项目可能难以获得足够用户和生态支持。此外，依赖第三方SaaS的API稳定性，一旦提供商变更协议，项目需要快速响应，否则可能导致服务中断。
articles.highlight: 开源认证网关，通过SDK、CLI、MCP、HTTP和OpenAPI将1000多家SaaS提供商连接到AI代理。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 3096 stars and recent public activity. Description: Open-source auth gateway connecting 1000+ SaaS providers to AI agents through SDK, CLI, MCP, HTTP, and OpenAPI.

zh.title: 开放连接器：开源认证网关，连接AI代理与1000+SaaS
zh.highlight: 开源认证网关，通过SDK、CLI、MCP、HTTP和OpenAPI将1000多家SaaS提供商连接到AI代理。
zh.summary: 这是一个开源项目，旨在通过统一的认证网关，让AI代理能够安全访问超过1000个SaaS服务。它提供了多种接入方式（SDK、CLI、MCP等），降低了AI应用与外部服务集成的门槛。该项目在GitHub上已有3096颗星，显示出社区对其价值的认可。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目需要维护与大量SaaS提供商的兼容性，面临持续更新和适配的成本挑战。认证网关市场已有成熟竞争者，新项目可能难以获得足够用户和生态支持。此外，依赖第三方SaaS的API稳定性，一旦提供商变更协议，项目需要快速响应，否则可能导致服务中断。

en.highlight: Open-source auth gateway connecting 1000+ SaaS providers to AI agents through SDK, CLI, MCP, HTTP, and OpenAPI.
en.summary: This open-source project provides a unified authentication gateway for AI agents to securely access over 1000 SaaS services. It offers multiple integration methods (SDK, CLI, MCP, etc.), lowering the barrier for AI applications to connect with external services. With 3096 GitHub stars, it shows strong community interest.
en.failureAnalysis: Maintaining compatibility with numerous SaaS providers requires constant updates and adaptation, posing significant cost challenges. The auth gateway market is competitive, and new entrants may struggle to gain traction and ecosystem support.
en.title: Open Connector: Open-Source Auth Gateway Connecting AI Agents to 1000+ SaaS

articles.title: EverMind-AI/Raven
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: Raven是一个开源项目，旨在构建记忆优先、自我改进的AI代理，利用EverOS和MiroThinker实现深度研究与推理。该项目值得关注，因为它探索了代理长期记忆与自主改进的架构设计，对AI代理的实际部署有参考价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: Raven可能面临记忆管理的技术瓶颈，如长期记忆的存储与检索效率；作为新兴项目，用户需求尚未充分验证，与现有AI代理框架（如AutoGPT）的竞争激烈。此外，自我改进功能的稳定性与安全性需要严格测试，否则可能导致不可预测行为。
articles.highlight: 记忆优先、自我改进的代理工具，基于EverOS构建，并由MiroThinker驱动的深度研究与推理能力加持。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2481 stars and recent public activity. Description: The memory-first, self-improving agent harness built on EverOS, with MiroThinker-powered deep research and reasoning.

zh.title: Raven：基于EverOS的记忆优先自我改进代理框架
zh.highlight: 记忆优先、自我改进的代理工具，基于EverOS构建，并由MiroThinker驱动的深度研究与推理能力加持。
zh.summary: Raven是一个开源项目，旨在构建记忆优先、自我改进的AI代理，利用EverOS和MiroThinker实现深度研究与推理。该项目值得关注，因为它探索了代理长期记忆与自主改进的架构设计，对AI代理的实际部署有参考价值。
zh.failureAnalysis: Raven可能面临记忆管理的技术瓶颈，如长期记忆的存储与检索效率；作为新兴项目，用户需求尚未充分验证，与现有AI代理框架（如AutoGPT）的竞争激烈。此外，自我改进功能的稳定性与安全性需要严格测试，否则可能导致不可预测行为。

en.highlight: The memory-first, self-improving agent harness built on EverOS, with MiroThinker-powered deep research and reasoning.
en.summary: Raven is an open-source project that builds a memory-first, self-improving AI agent using EverOS and MiroThinker for deep research and reasoning. It is worth reading because it explores architectures for long-term memory and autonomous improvement, offering insights for practical AI agent deployment.
en.failureAnalysis: Raven may face technical challenges in memory management, such as storage and retrieval efficiency; as a new project, user demand is unvalidated and competition with existing frameworks like AutoGPT is intense. Additionally, self-improvement stability and safety require rigorous testing to avoid unpredictable behavior.
en.title: Raven: A Memory-First Self-Improving Agent Harness Built on EverOS

articles.title: Doorman11991/smallcode
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目展示了一个针对小型语言模型优化的AI编码代理，在4B参数模型上实现87%的基准性能，证明小模型也能高效编程。值得关注的是，它可能降低AI编程助手的部署成本，推动更广泛的落地应用。
articles.failureAnalysis: 小模型在复杂编程任务上可能精度不足，实际场景中难以超越大模型。依赖特定基准存在过拟合风险，且面临Mainstream大模型（如GPT-4）的竞争压力。工程上，持续优化与维护需要专业团队，项目若缺乏持续投入难以保持竞争力。
articles.highlight: 该AI编码代理针对小模型优化，在4B活跃模型上达到87%基准性能。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1995 stars and recent public activity. Description: AI coding agent optimized for small LLMs. 87% benchmark with 4B-active model.

zh.title: 小模型优化的AI编码代理
zh.highlight: 该AI编码代理针对小模型优化，在4B活跃模型上达到87%基准性能。
zh.summary: 该项目展示了一个针对小型语言模型优化的AI编码代理，在4B参数模型上实现87%的基准性能，证明小模型也能高效编程。值得关注的是，它可能降低AI编程助手的部署成本，推动更广泛的落地应用。
zh.failureAnalysis: 小模型在复杂编程任务上可能精度不足，实际场景中难以超越大模型。依赖特定基准存在过拟合风险，且面临Mainstream大模型（如GPT-4）的竞争压力。工程上，持续优化与维护需要专业团队，项目若缺乏持续投入难以保持竞争力。

en.highlight: This AI coding agent, optimized for small LLMs, achieves 87% benchmark with a 4B active model.
en.summary: This project presents an AI coding agent optimized for small language models, achieving 87% benchmark performance with a 4B parameter model, demonstrating that small models can code effectively. It is worth reading because it may lower deployment costs for AI programming assistants and promote wider adoption.
en.failureAnalysis: Small models may sacrifice accuracy on complex tasks, and overfitting to the benchmark is a risk. They also face strong competition from mainstream large models like GPT-4.
en.title: AI Coding Agent Optimized for Small LLMs
